name: Binance
description: Inspect Spot symbols and exchange rules, retrieve current and average prices, view order books, and query candlestick history from Binance's public REST API.

auth.hint: The selected public Spot market-data endpoints use security type NONE and do not require an API key. Binance still applies IP-based request weights and rate limits.

tools.name: get_exchange_info
tools.description: Retrieve current Spot exchange rules, rate-limit definitions, and symbol information.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Optional single symbol such as BTCUSDT; do not combine with symbols, permissions, or symbolStatus.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Optional JSON array of symbols; do not combine with symbol, permissions, or symbolStatus.

params.name: permissions
params.description: Optional symbol-permission filter such as ["SPOT"]; do not combine with symbol or symbols.

params.name: showPermissionSets
params.description: Whether symbol permissionSets should be populated; defaults to true.

params.name: symbolStatus
params.description: Optional status filter: TRADING, HALT, or BREAK; do not combine with symbol or symbols.

tools.name: get_symbol_price
tools.description: Retrieve the latest price for one symbol, multiple symbols, or all symbols.

params.name: symbol
params.description: Optional single symbol such as BTCUSDT; do not combine with symbols.

params.name: symbols
params.description: Optional JSON array of symbols; do not combine with symbol.

params.name: symbolStatus
params.description: Optional trading-status filter: TRADING, HALT, or BREAK.

tools.name: get_average_price
tools.description: Retrieve the current moving average price for a Spot symbol.

tools.name: get_order_book
tools.description: Retrieve current bid and ask depth for a Spot symbol.

params.name: limit
params.description: Depth entries to return; defaults to 100 and is capped at 5,000, with higher values consuming more request weight.

params.name: symbolStatus
params.description: Optional trading-status filter: TRADING, HALT, or BREAK.

tools.name: get_klines
tools.description: Retrieve candlestick bars for a Spot symbol and interval.

params.name: startTime
params.description: Optional inclusive UTC start timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: endTime
params.description: Optional inclusive UTC end timestamp in milliseconds.

params.name: timeZone
params.description: Timezone used to interpret kline intervals, from -12:00 through +14:00; defaults to UTC.

params.name: limit
params.description: Number of candlesticks; defaults to 500 and is capped at 1,000.
